title: Enchantment Sprites for OptiFine and Chime
description: Custom, recognizable item texture for the tools
body:
This resource pack requires either OptiFine or Chime, or whatever mod that supports loading CITs (Custom Item Textures)!

----

![a little showcase of textures in the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99df7691f9704c8c174a7ec3a63dbc6810c54ce2.png)

This resource pack, basically, with the power of Optifine/Chime, changes how tools and weapons look depending on what enchantments they have! It even works on multiplayer, so you can see what other players' tools are enchanted with! (atleast on optifine, haven't tested multiplayer on chime yet)

These sets of sprites were once made for my personal mash of resource packs, but since it ended up being quite well, I've separated it and released it.

----

There currently are special textures for **Pickaxe, Shovel, Axe, Sword, and Bow** enchantments, and for **Diamond, Gold, Iron, and Netherite** tools.

All the current available "main" tool enchantments are supported, like Sharpness or Fortune, so it currently excludes Unbreaking or Mending - as I feel those are more of a "supporting" enchantment.

Special thanks to SupersonicNK for porting this to Chime format! 

Have fun!

and may heaven grant you fortune! -hyuponia
